docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF ANNIE SIN RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIN, ANNIE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,600.43 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF SIN, ANNIE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIN, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MATTHEW (COLDWELL BANKER)

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $12,390.43 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY ON 11-29-2017. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MATTHEW (COLDWELL BANKER)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,625.00 FILED BY SIN, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MATTHEW (COLDWELL BANKER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2015 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-01-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED. UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED FEB-26-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MATTHEW (COLDWELL BANKER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIN, ANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MATTHEW (COLDWELL BANKER) $9,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
